root canal.notes: Aetna covers 80% of root canal cost up to ₹15,000.

cleaning.notes: Aetna covers all preventive cleanings (2 per year).

crown.notes: Aetna covers 50% of crown cost up to ₹20,000.

root canal.notes: MaxBupa covers 60% under hospitalization rider only.

cleaning.notes: MaxBupa does not cover preventive cleanings.

root canal.notes: Star Health covers 50% under accident-only dental rider.

filling.notes: Star Health covers 80% of fillings if accident-related.
